title: Resize Images in an Issue/Epic/Sprint

posts.author: PureKrome (Justin)
posts.cookedHtml:
G’Day Monday.dev

We can currently paste images into a ‘form’. Nice! but would really love the ability to -resize- this image inline, in the form where it’s placed.

For example: In my issue, I copy/paste the image… it’s now in the UI … but then i can drag the side of the image left or right and it resizes.

I know you’re not going to like this … but … JIRA does this. I hate JIRA but it’s one of the few good things it does nicely.

e.g.

thanks kindly!
